expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves donut-label assumptions for label visibility, density limits, and overlap-sensitive presentation
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the benchmark focus is explicitly enumerated as: "context intake preserves donut-label assumptions ... specifically assumptions about: 1. Label visibility ... 2. Density limits ... 3. Overlap-sensitive presentation" and later assessed under "Coverage of donut-label assumptions in intake context".

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: The output is framed as Phase 1 throughout: title "VIZ-P1-CONTEXT-INTAKE-001 — Phase 1 (Context Intake) Contract Check", it states "Primary phase under test: Phase 1", and evaluates Phase 1 contractual artifacts (e.g., "Phase 1’s contractual artifact is `phase1_spawn_manifest.json`") and their absence.
